acl.Description: Object ACL to be applied to the state file

assume_role.Description: The `assume_role` block. If provided, terraform will attempt to assume this role using the supplied credentials.

external_id.Description: External role ID, which can be obtained by clicking the role name in the CAM console. It can contain 2-128 letters, digits, and symbols (=,.@:/-). Regex: [\w+=,.@:/-]*. It can be sourced from the `TENCENTCLOUD_ASSUME_ROLE_EXTERNAL_ID`.

policy.Description: A more restrictive policy when making the AssumeRole call. Its content must not contains `principal` elements. Notice: more syntax references, please refer to: [policies syntax logic](https://intl.cloud.tencent.com/document/product/598/10603).

role_arn.Description: The ARN of the role to assume. It can be sourced from the `TENCENTCLOUD_ASSUME_ROLE_ARN`.

session_duration.Description: The duration of the session when making the AssumeRole call. Its value ranges from 0 to 43200(seconds), and default is 7200 seconds. It can be sourced from the `TENCENTCLOUD_ASSUME_ROLE_SESSION_DURATION`.

session_name.Description: The session name to use when making the AssumeRole call. It can be sourced from the `TENCENTCLOUD_ASSUME_ROLE_SESSION_NAME`.

bucket.Description: The name of the COS bucket

cam_role_name.Description: The name of the CVM instance CAM role. It can be sourced from the `TENCENTCLOUD_CAM_ROLE_NAME` environment variable.

domain.Description: The root domain of the API request. Default is tencentcloudapi.com.

encrypt.Description: Whether to enable server side encryption of the state file

endpoint.Description: The custom endpoint for the COS API, e.g. http://cos-internal.{Region}.tencentcos.cn. Both HTTP and HTTPS are accepted.

key.Description: The path for saving the state file in bucket

prefix.Description: The directory for saving the state file in bucket

profile.Description: The profile name as set in the shared credentials. It can also be sourced from the `TENCENTCLOUD_PROFILE` environment variable. If not set, the default profile created with `tccli configure` will be used.

region.Description: The region of the COS bucket

security_token.Description: TencentCloud Security Token of temporary access credentials. It can be sourced from the `TENCENTCLOUD_SECURITY_TOKEN` environment variable. Notice: for supported products, please refer to: [temporary key supported products](https://intl.cloud.tencent.com/document/product/598/10588).

shared_credentials_dir.Description: The directory of the shared credentials. It can also be sourced from the `TENCENTCLOUD_SHARED_CREDENTIALS_DIR` environment variable. If not set this defaults to ~/.tccli.
